mission.title: harbor: A default `library` can be auto appended to the pull path when proxying cache dockerhub
mission.description: A default `library` can be auto appended to the pull path when proxying cache dockerhub . This issue affects 11+ users.

steps.title: Identify harbor feature symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your harbor deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=harbor
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors related to: A default `library` can be auto appended to the pull path when proxying cache dockerhub

steps.title: Check current Namespace configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant harbor resources:
```bash
kubectl get namespace -A
kubectl describe namespace <name> -n <namespace>
```
Now, for pulling popular images of the docker hub, user needs to explicitly specify the `library` namespace.

`docker pull 10.192.203.193/szou_proxy/library/redis:4.0`

Actually, we can support the sh

steps.title: Apply the fix for A default `library` can be auto appended to the pull path wh
steps.description:
Check project is default project format in dockerhub
 Redirect blob/manifest request to default url

Thank you for contributing to Harbor!

# Comprehensive Summary of your change

# Issue being fixed
Fixes #(issue)

Please indicate you've done the following:
```yaml
// new project as Proxy Cache in HARBOR
${HARBOR}/library: proxy_cache("docker.io", "/library")

${HARBOR}/library/nginx:latest => docker.io/library/nginx:latest
```

steps.title: Confirm A default `library` can be auto appended to the pu is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=harbor -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
The root cause is: Check project is default project format in dockerhub
 Redirect blob/manifest request to default url

Thank you for contributing to Harbor!

# Comprehensive Summary of your change

# Issue being fixed
Fixes #(issue)

Please indicate you've done the following:. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.
codeSnippets:
// new project as Proxy Cache in HARBOR_PROXY
${HARBOR_PROXY}/docker.io: proxy_cache("docker.io", "")
// new project as Proxy Cache in HARBOR_INTERNAL
${HARBOR_INTERNAL}/docker.io: proxy_cache("${HARBOR_PROXY}", "/docker.io")

${HARBOR_INTERNAL}/docker.io/library/busybox 
=> ${HARBOR_PROXY}/docker.io/library/busybox
=> docker.io/library/busybox

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with harbor installed or the issue environment reproducible.
